name: Stickman Bullets Ragdoll
description: Stickman with a bazooka blows up his enemies and destroys their bases. - Full possibility of destruction of everything around - Multiple bullets for stickman weapons - Physical enemies and crazy explosions - Levels with exciting challenges Enjoy addictive gameplay with amazing destruction! Choose bullets for weapons and destroy everything around. Destroy ragdoll enemies. Explode bombs, shoot rockets and make your enemies fly away from the explosions, destroying their bases and crushing their buildings! Fun physical enemies and crazy explosions with amazing content and challenges Help Stickman destroy all enemies to win!
